# Alex Gerlitz - AI Automation / Backend / Platform Engineer

> I build backend-owned AI workflow and operations systems for real businesses: RAG, transcript and call analysis, approval flows, CRM/ERP/API adapters, FastAPI/PostgreSQL backends, Docker/CI, runbooks, and recovery paths.

This is the AI-readable proof index for my public GitHub/LinkedIn review route. It is intentionally short: start with the strongest proof path, then inspect the repositories and verification routes that show how the work is built, tested, operated, and handed off.

## Primary Proof Route

- [DriveDesk AI Operator proof route](https://alexgerlitz.github.io/AlexGerlitz/drivedesk-proof-route.html): backend-owned AI workflow proof for RAG, transcript analysis, privacy redaction, lead scoring, approvals, CRM handoff, audit, retries, and adapter boundaries.
- [Autoschool Intake/Admin Proof](https://alexgerlitz.github.io/AlexGerlitz/autoschool-intake-admin.html): public-safe first-job proof for Telegram request intake, backend validation, database record, admin queue handoff, operator status workflow, and privacy boundary without exposing learner data or live admin screenshots.
- [AI Backend Proof Pack](https://alexgerlitz.github.io/AlexGerlitz/ai-backend-proof-pack.html): compact route through AI workflow, backend/platform, integration, DevOps, live proof, verification, Decision-Ready Contact before PDF resume, and resume evidence. It also exposes structured proof order, role shortlist, and offer-fit data.
- [AI Automation Role Fit](https://alexgerlitz.github.io/AlexGerlitz/ai-automation-role-fit.html): focused role-fit route for backend-owned AI workflows, RAG/context retrieval, structured outputs, approvals, CRM/API handoff, tests, logs, docs, and supportable runbooks.
- [Enterprise Readiness](https://alexgerlitz.github.io/AlexGerlitz/enterprise-readiness.html): international and Europe-compatible employer-grade review route for architecture, state ownership, integration contracts, English-first docs, async proof paths, specialist review evidence, international hiring readiness, international role screen, specialist backend-owned AI workflow signal, reliability, privacy, observability, CI, runbooks, Decision-Ready Contact before PDF resume, and handoff quality. It also exposes structured enterprise-readiness data for decision path, specialist signal, international role screen, evidence matrix, and next proof targets.
- [Role Fit Pack](https://alexgerlitz.github.io/AlexGerlitz/application-pack.html): role-fit summary for AI automation, backend/platform, integration, DevOps, Europe-compatible remote signal, shortlist proof, structured role-fit decision path, and Decision-Ready Contact before PDF resume.
- [DriveDesk Flagship Platform](https://alexgerlitz.github.io/AlexGerlitz/flagship-platform.html): larger backend/platform proof path around roles, records, workflows, adapters, audit/outbox, admin/operator surfaces, DevOps, observability, backups, and recovery paths.
- [Hiring decision route](https://alexgerlitz.github.io/AlexGerlitz/hiring-decision.html): one-minute role fit, high-bar specialist screen, why to shortlist me, specialist reason to message, risk reduction, strongest proof, first-month ownership, Decision-Ready Contact before PDF resume, structured 30-second screen, shortlist scorecard data, and specialist-reason data.
- [LinkedIn Proof Signal](https://alexgerlitz.github.io/AlexGerlitz/linkedin-proof-signal.html): compact public update route with verified live skill surface, first Featured proof route, DriveDesk proof route, AI Backend Proof Pack, Decision-Ready Contact, copy-ready LinkedIn update, and first message prompts for profile views. It also exposes the next LinkedIn skill-order target and a LinkedIn Activation Pack with post, first-comment, and short-DM reply copy.
- [LinkedIn Recruiter Packet](https://alexgerlitz.github.io/AlexGerlitz/linkedin-recruiter-packet.html): inbound offer fit, international role screen, search filters, recruiter filter map, 30-second fit, employer trigger matrix, shortlist scorecard, ownership signal, featured work samples, proof order, copy-ready first messages, message triggers, Decision-Ready Contact, decision-ready reply, expected first result, shortlist signal, risk reduction, AI-native execution proof, and international/Europe-compatible remote-team proof routing. It also exposes structured recruiter packet data.
- [Decision-Ready Contact](https://alexgerlitz.github.io/AlexGerlitz/decision-ready-contact.html): fastest message route, recruiter offer triage, minimum first context, copy-ready first messages, fit read, risk check, smallest responsible first slice, proof-backed offer route, next step, structured contact-route data, and best first proof links.
- [LinkedIn banner asset](https://alexgerlitz.github.io/AlexGerlitz/assets/linkedin-banner.png): prepared 1584x396 top-card cover image for the DriveDesk AI Operator profile route, with backend/platform, AI workflow, CRM/ERP integration, proof route, live smoke, PDF resume, and GitHub CI signals.
- [PDF resume](https://alexgerlitz.github.io/AlexGerlitz/output/pdf/alex-gerlitz-remote-ai-automation-resume.pdf): one-page application handoff with remote backend/platform fit, public proof projects, AI-native delivery loop, Europe-compatible async signal, proof-by-intent routes, and contact paths.
- [AI Ops Hiring Signal Brief](https://github.com/AlexGerlitz/ai-ops-workflow-kit/blob/main/docs/evidence/hiring-signal-brief.txt): shortest backend/platform proof file for RAG quality, approval, CRM-safe handoff, retry/dead-letter behavior, idempotency, dry-run boundaries, and public-safe evidence.
- [AI Ops Employer Trigger Proof](https://github.com/AlexGerlitz/ai-ops-workflow-kit/blob/main/docs/EMPLOYER_TRIGGER_PROOF.md): maps employer triggers to concrete repo evidence, verification commands, first-result proof, and backend-owned workflow boundaries.
- [AI Ops demo walkthrough](https://github.com/AlexGerlitz/ai-ops-workflow-kit/blob/main/docs/DEMO_WALKTHROUGH.md): committed visual route for transcript -> RAG -> approval -> CRM-safe handoff.
- [Recruiter Preferences](https://alexgerlitz.github.io/AlexGerlitz/recruiter-preferences.html): Open-to-Work alignment for job titles, remote work mode, employment types, recruiter search keywords, recruiter filter map, proof stack by search intent, proof order, Decision-Ready Contact before PDF resume, and first contact fit. It also maps the LinkedIn skills search surface to public proof and exposes structured data for recruiter/search tooling.
- [Start conversation](https://alexgerlitz.github.io/AlexGerlitz/start-conversation.html): recruiter shortcut, copy-ready first messages, message triggers, role-target links, PDF resume, proof-backed project offer route, ownership-first context, and the fastest contact path.
- [Contact routes](https://alexgerlitz.github.io/AlexGerlitz/inbound-response.html): message triggers, search intent first links for AI Automation/RAG, Backend/Python/Platform, CRM/ERP/API Integration, DevOps/Reliability, proof-backed fixed-scope offers, plus decision-ready context and response shape.
- [Selected proof projects](https://alexgerlitz.github.io/AlexGerlitz/projects.html): repo-level evidence across DriveDesk AI Operator, DriveDesk Core, AI Ops Workflow Kit, DeployMate, and MPlusForm.
- [Remote role targets](https://alexgerlitz.github.io/AlexGerlitz/role-targets.html): search-fit roles mapped to proof, first-month ownership, direct review routes, and structured recruiter search snapshot data.
- [Work with me](https://alexgerlitz.github.io/AlexGerlitz/work-with-me.html): remote role and fixed-scope project route with best immediate starts, fit filter, proof links, and contact path.
- [Proposal-ready Services request](https://alexgerlitz.github.io/AlexGerlitz/services.html): LinkedIn Services request shape with proof-backed offer router, current workflow, systems involved, one observable success condition, constraints, what must not break, Decision-Ready Contact before PDF resume, and services decision-route structured data.
- [Skill evidence map](https://alexgerlitz.github.io/AlexGerlitz/skill-evidence.html): skills mapped to public proof for AI automation, backend/platform, CRM/ERP integration, DevOps, and AI-native delivery discipline.
- [Verification pack](https://alexgerlitz.github.io/AlexGerlitz/verification-pack.html): CI, live smoke, public demo, evidence links, proof freshness, current green proof, and structured technical verification data.
- [AI Backend Proof Pack Markdown](https://alexgerlitz.github.io/AlexGerlitz/AI_BACKEND_PROOF_PACK.md): GitHub-readable proof order for recruiters, hiring managers, and technical reviewers, with Decision-Ready Contact before PDF resume.
- [Enterprise Readiness Markdown](https://alexgerlitz.github.io/AlexGerlitz/ENTERPRISE_READINESS.md): GitHub-readable matrix for enterprise/backend/platform review signals, Decision-Ready Contact before PDF resume, and the structured review data exposed by the HTML route.
- [LinkedIn Services Fit](https://alexgerlitz.github.io/AlexGerlitz/linkedin-service-page-fit.html): public HTML fit filter for broad LinkedIn Services labels around backend/platform ownership, AI workflow, integration, data, DevOps, internal operations, and Decision-Ready Contact before PDF resume. It also exposes structured broad-category, best-fit request, not-fit service filter, and services decision-route data.

## Employer Decision Path

- 2-minute fit check: Enterprise Readiness -> Role Fit Pack -> Decision-Ready Contact -> PDF resume.
- 10-minute technical review: AI Ops reviewer snapshot, DriveDesk Core, and verification pack.
- 30-minute specialist review: privacy boundary, live owner proof, DeployMate proof, current CI/smoke routes, and handoff evidence.

## Best-Fit Work

- Remote-only backend, platform, DevOps, AI automation, integration, and internal operations roles for international and distributed teams.
- Fixed-scope projects with one messy workflow, one success condition, and a first working slice with tests, logs, docs, and a handoff path.
- Strongest fit: backend-owned AI workflows, CRM/ERP/API adapters, RAG systems, Telegram/operator approvals, internal admin tools, deployment/recovery workflows, and production-style proof.
- LinkedIn Services fit filter: Web Development or Custom Software Development requests are a fit only when they include backend/platform, AI workflow, integration, DevOps, or internal-operations ownership.
- Not my target right now: onsite-only work, pure prompt/content tasks, isolated brochure/static websites, student/course assignments, generic mobile/ecommerce apps without backend or integration ownership, and vague work where success cannot be verified.

## Search-Fit Role Targets

- Headline: AI Automation / Backend / Platform Engineer | RAG, LLM workflows, CRM/ERP integrations, FastAPI, Docker, DevOps | DriveDesk AI Operator.
- Best-fit titles: Back End Developer, Python Developer, AI Automation Engineer, LLM Workflow / RAG Engineer, Platform Engineer, DevOps Engineer, Integration Engineer, Internal Tools Engineer.
- LinkedIn recruiter search alignment: remote-only full-time roles where Python, FastAPI, PostgreSQL, Docker, GitHub Actions, RAG, Vector Databases, CRM/ERP/API integration, Systems Integration, DevOps, OpenAPI, n8n, Telegram, or pgvector appear in the role.
- Work mode: remote-only full-time roles or concrete fixed-scope projects with backend/platform/integration ownership.
- First-month ownership: ship one business workflow slice with backend-owned state, tests, logs, docs, deployment path, and handoff.

## Pinned Proof Repositories

- [DriveDesk Core](https://github.com/AlexGerlitz/drivedesk-core): FastAPI/PostgreSQL operations platform foundation with tenants, RBAC, audit/outbox, adapters, OpenAPI, Docker, pytest, CI, docs, and public demo.
- [Autoschool Intake/Admin Proof](https://alexgerlitz.github.io/AlexGerlitz/autoschool-intake-admin.html): sanitized route for a private driving-school bot/admin workflow where public proof uses synthetic data only.
- [AI Ops Workflow Kit](https://github.com/AlexGerlitz/ai-ops-workflow-kit): hiring signal brief, document intake, committed demo GIF/walkthrough, privacy redaction before RAG/approval/CRM handoff, deterministic RAG quality eval, RAG retrieval, transcript analysis, approvals, Telegram callback, dry-run Bitrix CRM handoff, retry/dead-letter behavior, idempotent outbox, reviewer observability snapshot, 54-pass public verification gate, CI, and smoke checks.
- [DeployMate](https://github.com/AlexGerlitz/deploymate): self-hosted Docker deployment control panel proof with FastAPI, Next.js, PostgreSQL, SSH runtime tooling, health checks, logs, release gates, and runbooks.
- [MPlusForm](https://github.com/AlexGerlitz/MPlusForm): validation-boundary and trust-model automation proof with untrusted local files, optional Python sync, server-approved snapshots, Windows operations docs, Lua addon boundary, and [public verification run](https://github.com/AlexGerlitz/MPlusForm/actions/runs/28296918568).

## Fast Contact

- Message me first when there is one messy workflow, one risky integration boundary, or one backend/platform/DevOps slice that should become testable, logged, documented, and handed off.
- First reply promise: fit read, risky assumptions, smallest responsible first slice, proof path to inspect, and the right next route: remote role, fixed-scope project, technical review, or no-fit.
- Copy-ready first messages cover remote role screens, workflow projects, and technical proof reviews.
- Message prompt anchors: "Can you send the best proof route and the smallest first slice you would own?", "Can you map the risks, proof route, and first responsible slice?", and "strongest repo, CI/live-smoke evidence".
- Inbound offer fit: best messages name one remote backend/platform role, AI workflow, integration boundary, or DevOps reliability need plus one success condition, systems involved, ownership boundary, timeline, and compensation band if shareable.
- Shortest inbound path: Message on LinkedIn -> Decision-Ready Contact -> LinkedIn Recruiter Packet -> Hiring Decision -> DriveDesk Proof Route -> AI Backend Proof Pack -> PDF resume.
- First useful result: a verified slice with backend-owned state, tests, logs, docs, and a handoff route.
- Message reason router: use Start conversation to choose remote role hiring, workflow/project, or technical proof review before sending LinkedIn context.
- Recruiter shortcut: for a remote role, message first through Decision-Ready Contact with role title, remote setup, stack, first-month ownership, timeline, and compensation band if shareable, then use LinkedIn Recruiter Packet, Hiring decision route, Recruiter Preferences, Remote role targets, Skill evidence, recruiter Boolean search strings, and the PDF resume. Best match: backend/platform, AI automation, CRM/ERP/API integration, internal tools, or DevOps ownership.

- [Remote AI Automation Services](https://alexgerlitz.github.io/AlexGerlitz/services.html): fast first message and proposal-ready route for one remote role or one messy workflow, one success condition, systems involved, constraints, what must not break, Decision-Ready Contact, and a working-slice outcome.
- [Remote role targets](https://alexgerlitz.github.io/AlexGerlitz/role-targets.html)

- [Decision-Ready Contact](https://alexgerlitz.github.io/AlexGerlitz/decision-ready-contact.html)
- [Inbound brief](https://alexgerlitz.github.io/AlexGerlitz/intake-brief.html): role, project, proof-backed offer route, success condition, systems involved, constraints, and verification context.

- [PDF resume](https://alexgerlitz.github.io/AlexGerlitz/output/pdf/alex-gerlitz-remote-ai-automation-resume.pdf)

## Review Notes

- AI-native delivery loop: AI tooling compresses discovery, implementation, debugging, docs, and review while architecture, state boundaries, privacy checks, tests, logs, deployment, runbooks, and shipped quality stay engineering-owned.
- The main signal is not no-code node wiring. The signal is backend-owned state, deterministic RAG quality eval, privacy boundaries, audit, retries, idempotency, integration contracts, smoke checks, and runbooks.
